title: Dark Tech UI
description: This resource pack overhauls the vanilla game's UI with a dark mode techy aesthetic.
body:
![Dark Tech Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c68470b4313b82bd2db81b02ee5695e3a3b87cf4.png)

This is a dark mode, futuristic scifi style resource pack inspired by tron and Cyberpunk, adding detail while still making it easy on the eyes. It's designed primarily for 1.20.1 and I will not be porting it forward or back versions. I may add mod support in the future but I will not be taking requests. Hope yall like it.

![Basic crafting and recipe book](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1b9d8f7831aef0c48ed826e0cd00455282f9d16.png)
